name: airport_wildlife_drone_hedge_row_cover_crop_tradeoff
premise: Bird-strike risk spiked after a wetland restoration project; wildlife staff wants a runway-use curfew operations refuses. In Aviation Safety, the situation tagged internally around airport wildlife drone hedge row cover crop tradeoff has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is short term versus long term under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Alex Garcia
agents.identity: I am Alex Garcia, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Aviation Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gina Zedillo
agents.identity: I am Gina Zedillo, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Aviation Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of long term.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of short term even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Alex Garcia must choose under short term versus long term. What does Alex Garcia do?
